# Transcrição: 03.2 WHAT SKILLS YOULL NEED

- **Fonte:** 03.2 WHAT SKILLS YOULL NEED
- **Duração:** 01:38
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 01:38]

So now let's discuss the skills that are necessary to succeed on Upwork. So one of the major benefits of prospecting on Upwork is that it doesn't matter if you're an SEO, or if you're a salesperson, or if you're a web developer, or a Facebook ad specialist, or a conversion optimizer, or a translationist, or the list goes on. It doesn't matter what you do. If what you do can be offered on a freelance basis, and you can offer that as a service, you can do it on Upwork. So it doesn't really matter what your skill set is in that sense, from a trade standpoint. More what I'm talking about in this video is that you have to be good at communication. And I don't just mean explaining what you do. I mean, you have to be good at building rapport over text in a very short span of time, as well as rapport on the phone. So you have to be able to send a quick text, because the way that Upwork works is you send a cover letter. So you essentially send a quick letter, a quick note to anyone that you're applying to the job for. So they're only going to read a paragraph or so until they can lose interest. So you have to make sure that you can convey your message, and convey conviction and confidence in a very short snippet of text to be able to stand out. And then, of course, if you get on the phone with any of these individuals, you have to be able to speak with conviction so that they know, you know, what you're talking about. So having, you know, confidence, conviction, and the ability to communicate both text and verbally are absolutely essential to succeed on Upwork.
